description: Neoprene SCBA Face Seal is the portion of an SCBA facepiece made from neoprene rubber that seals the facepiece against the face of a firefighter.
short desc: Neoprene SCBA Face Seal is the portion of an SCBA facepiece that seals against the face.
source: Sampled from an NFPA 1981-2019 compliant SCBA.

measured property.test description: Initial-mass-normalized mass loss rate [1/s] was measured in the simultaneous thermal analyzer experiments at two heating rates: 10 K/min and 30 K/min.
